title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 358.130 - Partnership bound by partner's wrongful act
text:
358.130.  Partnership bound by partner's wrongful act. — Where, by any wrongful act or omission of any partner acting in the ordinary course of the business of the partnership or with the authority of his copartners, loss or injury is caused to any person, not being a partner in the partnership, or any penalty is incurred, the partnership is liable therefor to the same extent as the partner so acting or omitting to act.
(L. 1949 p. 506 § 13)
